rule_name: Windows - Security and System Event Logs Cleared
search_query: index=windows (EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=104) | table _time, Computer, User, EventCode, Message | rename EventCode as "Action_ID", Message as "Log_Details"
description: Detects when a user or process clears the Windows Security or System event logs. This is a common anti-forensic technique used by attackers to hide their activity.
